creator: mvh@netcom.com
text:
Seems to have fixed itself.  Hmmm.  No recent changes to the makefile
of mew-mule... so never mind.  I will let you know if I see it again..

Mike Harding

    * 
    * >Description:
    * if you do a make clean, it gets stuck in /usr/ports/japanese/mew-mule:

   Satoshi
